# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Machines running our web application. Include OS and data disks with default settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting VMs running - we'll add disk encryption and security features in phase 2 after validating the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]"
    },
    "vmCount": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 2,
      "minValue": 1
    },
    "vmNamePrefix": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "webvm"
    },
    "adminUsername": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "azureuser"
    },
    "adminPassword": {
      "type": "secureString",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Local admin password for Windows VMs."
      }
    },
    "vmSize": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Standard_D2s_v5"
    },
    "osType": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Windows",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Windows",
        "Linux"
      ]
    },
    "windowsImageSku": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "2022-datacenter-azure-edition"
    },
    "linuxImageSku": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "22_04-lts-gen2"
    },
    "vnetName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "web-vnet"
    },
    "vnetAddressPrefix": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "10.0.0.0/16"
    },
    "subnetName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "web-subnet"
    },
    "subnetPrefix": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "10.0.1.0/24"
    },
    "nsgName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "web-nsg"
    },
    "publicIpName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "web-pip"
    },
    "lbName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "web-lb"
    },
    "lbSku": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Standard",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Standard"
      ]
    },
    "appPort": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 80
    },
    "enableRdpSshInbound": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true
    },
    "dataDiskSizeGB": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 128,
      "minValue": 32
    },
    "dataDiskCount": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 1,
      "minValue": 0,
      "maxValue": 8
    },
    "bootDiagnosticsEnabled": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "subnetId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('subnetName'))]",
    "frontendIpConfigName": "LoadBalancerFrontEnd",
    "backendPoolName": "web-backend",
    "probeName": "http-probe",
    "lbRuleName": "http-rule",
    "natPoolNameWindows": "rdp-natpool",
    "natPoolNameLinux": "ssh-natpool",
    "diagStorageName": "[toLower(concat('diag', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id)))]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
      "name": "[variables('diagStorageName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "kind": "StorageV2",
      "sku": {
        "name": "Standard_LRS"
      },
      "properties": {
        "minimumTlsVersion": "TLS1_2",
        "allowBlobPublicAccess": false
      },
      "condition": "[parameters('bootDiagnosticsEnabled')]"
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups",
      "apiVersion": "2023-11-01",
      "name": "[parameters('nsgName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "securityRules": [
          {
            "name": "Allow-HTTP",
            "properties": {
              "priority": 100,
              "direction": "Inbound",
              "access": "Allow",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "[string(parameters('appPort'))]",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "*",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*"
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "Allow-HTTPS",
            "properties": {
              "priority": 110,
              "direction": "Inbound",
              "access": "Allow",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "443",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "*",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*"
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "Allow-RDP",
            "properties": {
              "priority": 200,
              "direction": "Inbound",
              "access": "Allow",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "3389",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "*",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*"
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "Allow-SSH",
            "properties": {
              "priority": 210,
              "direction": "Inbound",
              "access": "Allow",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "22",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "*",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups/securityRules",
      "apiVersion": "2023-11-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('nsgName'), '/Allow-RDP')]",
      "condition": "[and(parameters('enableRdpSshInbound'), equals(parameters('osType'), 'Windows'))]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', parameters('nsgName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "priority": 200,
        "direction": "Inbound",
        "access": "Allow",
        "protocol": "Tcp",
        "sourcePortRange": "*",
        "destinationPortRange": "3389",
        "sourceAddressPrefix": "*",
        "destinationAddressPrefix": "*"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups/securityRules",
      "apiVersion": "2023-11-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('nsgName'), '/Allow-SSH')]",
      "condition": "[and(parameters('enableRdpSshInbound'), equals(parameters('osType'), 'Linux'))]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', parameters('nsgName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "priority": 210,
        "direction": "Inbound",
        "access": "Allow",
        "protocol": "Tcp",
        "sourcePortRange": "*",
        "destinationPortRange": "22",
        "sourceAddressPrefix": "*",
        "destinationAddressPrefix": "*"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks",
      "apiVersion": "2023-11-01",
      "name": "[parameters('vnetName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', parameters('nsgName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "addressSpace": {
          "addressPrefixes": [
            "[parameters('vnetAddressPrefix')]"
          ]
        },
        "subnets": [
          {
            "name": "[parameters('subnetName')]",
            "properties": {
              "addressPrefix": "[parameters('subnetPrefix')]",
              "networkSecurityGroup": {
                "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', parameters('nsgName'))]"
              }
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses",
      "apiVersion": "2023-11-01",
      "name": "[parameters('publicIpName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "[parameters('lbSku')]"
      },
      "properties": {
        "publicIPAllocationMethod": "Static",
        "dnsSettings": {
          "domainNameLabel": "[toLower(concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), '-', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id)))]"
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/loadBalancers",
      "apiVersion": "2023-11-01",
      "name": "[parameters('lbName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "[parameters('lbSku')]"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', parameters('publicIpName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "frontendIPConfigurations": [
          {
            "name": "[variables('frontendIpConfigName')]",
            "properties": {
              "publicIPAddress": {
                "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', parameters('publicIpName'))]"
              }
            }
          }
        ],
        "backendAddressPools": [
          {
            "name": "[variables('backendPoolName')]"
          }
        ],
        "probes": [
          {
            "name": "[variables('probeName')]",
            "properties": {
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "port": "[parameters('appPort')]",
              "intervalInSeconds": 5,
              "numberOfProbes": 2
            }
          }
        ],
        "loadBalancingRules": [
          {
            "name": "[variables('lbRuleName')]",
            "properties": {
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "frontendPort": "[parameters('appPort')]",
              "backendPort": "[parameters('appPort')]",
              "enableFloatingIP": false,
              "idleTimeoutInMinutes": 4,
              "loadDistribution": "Default",
              "frontendIPConfiguration": {
                "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/loadBalancers/frontendIPConfigurations', parameters('lbName'), variables('frontendIpConfigName'))]"
              },
              "backendAddressPool": {
                "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/loadBalancers/backendAddressPools', parameters('lbName'), variables('backendPoolName'))]"
              },
              "probe": {
                "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/loadBalancers/probes', parameters('lbName'), variables('probeName'))]"
              }
            }
          }
        ],
        "inboundNatPools": [
          {
            "name": "[variables('natPoolNameWindows')]",
            "properties": {
              "frontendIPConfiguration": {
                "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/loadBalancers/frontendIPConfigurations', parameters('lbName'), variables('frontendIpConfigName'))]"
              },
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "frontendPortRangeStart": 50000,
              "frontendPortRangeEnd": 50199,
              "backendPort": 3389
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "[variables('natPoolNameLinux')]",
            "properties": {
              "frontendIPConfiguration": {
                "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/loadBalancers/frontendIPConfigurations', parameters('lbName'), variables('frontendIpConfigName'))]"
              },
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "frontendPortRangeStart": 50200,
              "frontendPortRangeEnd": 50399,
              "backendPort": 22
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Compute/availabilitySets",
      "apiVersion": "2024-03-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), '-as')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "Aligned"
      },
      "properties": {
        "platformFaultDomainCount": 2,
        "platformUpdateDomainCount": 5
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces",
      "apiVersion": "2023-11-01",
      "name": "[format('{0}-nic-{1}', parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1))]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "copy": {
        "name": "nicLoop",
        "count": "[parameters('vmCount')]"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', parameters('vnetName'))]",
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/loadBalancers', parameters('lbName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "ipConfigurations": [
          {
            "name": "ipconfig1",
            "properties": {
              "subnet": {
                "id": "[variables('subnetId')]"
              },
              "loadBalancerBackendAddressPools": [
                {
                  "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/loadBalancers/backendAddressPools', parameters('lbName'), variables('backendPoolName'))]"
                }
              ],
              "loadBalancerInboundNatPools": [
                {
                  "id": "[if(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Windows'), resourceId('Microsoft.Network/loadBalancers/inboundNatPools', parameters('lbName'), variables('natPoolNameWindows')), resourceId('Microsoft.Network/loadBalancers/inboundNatPools', parameters('lbName'), variables('natPoolNameLinux')))]"
                }
              ]
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines",
      "apiVersion": "2024-03-01",
      "name": "[format('{0}-{1}', parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1))]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "copy": {
        "name": "vmLoop",
        "count": "[parameters('vmCount')]"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', format('{0}-nic-{1}', parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1)))]",
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/availabilitySets', concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), '-as'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "availabilitySet": {
          "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/availabilitySets', concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), '-as'))]"
        },
        "hardwareProfile": {
          "vmSize": "[parameters('vmSize')]"
        },
        "osProfile": {
          "computerName": "[format('{0}-{1}', parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1))]",
          "adminUsername": "[parameters('adminUsername')]",
          "adminPassword": "[parameters('adminPassword')]",
          "windowsConfiguration": "[if(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Windows'), json('{\"provisionVMAgent\": true, \"enableAutomaticUpdates\": true}'), json('null'))]",
          "linuxConfiguration": "[if(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Linux'), json('{\"disablePasswordAuthentication\": false, \"provisionVMAgent\": true}'), json('null'))]"
        },
        "storageProfile": {
          "imageReference": "[if(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Windows'), json(concat('{\"publisher\":\"MicrosoftWindowsServer\",\"offer\":\"WindowsServer\",\"sku\":\"', parameters('windowsImageSku'), '\",\"version\":\"latest\"}')), json(concat('{\"publisher\":\"Canonical\",\"offer\":\"0001-com-ubuntu-server-jammy\",\"sku\":\"', parameters('linuxImageSku'), '\",\"version\":\"latest\"}')))]",
          "osDisk": {
            "createOption": "FromImage",
            "managedDisk": {
              "storageAccountType": "StandardSSD_LRS"
            }
          },
          "dataDisks": "[if(greater(parameters('dataDiskCount'), 0), array(createArray()), json('[]'))]"
        },
        "networkProfile": {
          "networkInterfaces": [
            {
              "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', format('{0}-nic-{1}', parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1)))]"
            }
          ]
        },
        "diagnosticsProfile": {
          "bootDiagnostics": {
            "enabled": "[parameters('bootDiagnosticsEnabled')]",
            "storageUri": "[if(parameters('bootDiagnosticsEnabled'), reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('diagStorageName')), '2023-01-01').primaryEndpoints.blob, json('null'))]"
          }
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/dataDisks",
      "apiVersion": "2024-03-01",
      "name": "[format('{0}-{1}/datadisk-{2}', parameters('vmNamePrefix'), copyIndex(1), copyIndex('diskLoop', 0))]",
      "copy": {
        "name": "diskLoop",
        "count": "[mul(parameters('vmCount'), parameters('dataDiskCount'))]"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines', format('{0}-{1}', parameters('vmNamePrefix'), add(1, mod(copyIndex('diskLoop'), parameters('vmCount')))))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "lun": "[div(copyIndex('diskLoop'), parameters('vmCount'))]",
        "createOption": "Empty",
        "diskSizeGB": "[parameters('dataDiskSizeGB')]",
        "managedDisk": {
          "storageAccountType": "StandardSSD_LRS"
        }
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "loadBalancerPublicIp": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', parameters('publicIpName')), '2023-11-01').ipAddress]"
    },
    "loadBalancerFqdn": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', parameters('publicIpName')), '2023-11-01').dnsSettings.fqdn]"
    }
  }
}
